title: User responses to recommendations (the feedback queue)
description: Each entry is one user decision on one recommendation. Written by the dashboard or by a human editing the file. Read by responder-agent which dispatches actions to implementer.

ts.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp the user submitted the decision.

from_run.description: The run-ts whose recommendations this targets.

action.description: implement=ship as proposed; skip=acknowledge but don't act; modify=apply with notes; merge=combine with another rec_id.

merge_with.description: Required if action=merge: the other rec_id to combine with.

consumed_at.description: Set by responder-agent when it picks this up. Null = pending.

consumed_in_run_ts.description: Run-ts of the implementer run that actioned this response. Null = pending.
